title.tr: Microsoft Defender ile Tarama (Microsoft Learn prosedurleri)

risk_note.tr: Adimlar Microsoft Learn 'Run and customize on-demand scans in Microsoft Defender Antivirus' (14 May 2026 guncel) belgesinden alinmistir. Microsoft alintisi: 'In most cases, a quick scan is sufficient and is the recommended option for scheduled or on-demand scans.'
risk_note.en: Steps sourced from Microsoft Learn 'Run and customize on-demand scans in Microsoft Defender Antivirus' (updated 2026-05-14). Microsoft quote: 'In most cases, a quick scan is sufficient and is the recommended option for scheduled or on-demand scans.'

body.tr: Microsoft alintisi: 'A quick scan looks at all the locations where there could be malware registered to start with the system, such as registry keys and known Windows startup folders. Combined with always-on, real-time protection, which reviews files when they are opened and closed, and whenever a user navigates to a folder, a quick scan helps provide strong protection against malware that starts with the system and kernel-level malware.' Tipler: Quick (onerilen), Full (tum dosyalar), Custom (belirli klasor).
body.en: Microsoft quote: 'A quick scan looks at all the locations where there could be malware registered to start with the system, such as registry keys and known Windows startup folders. Combined with always-on, real-time protection... a quick scan helps provide strong protection against malware that starts with the system and kernel-level malware.' Types: Quick (recommended), Full (all files), Custom (specific folder).

title.tr: PowerShell: tek satir Quick scan (Microsoft'un onerdigi)

body.tr: Yonetici Command Prompt'ta: MpCmdRun.exe -Scan -ScanType 1 (Quick) / -ScanType 2 (Full) / -ScanType 3 (Custom). Microsoft uyarisi: 'Including very large directories in quick scans might significantly increase the time it takes for the quick scan to complete.'
body.en: In elevated Command Prompt: MpCmdRun.exe -Scan -ScanType 1 (Quick) / 2 (Full) / 3 (Custom). Microsoft warning: 'Including very large directories in quick scans might significantly increase the time it takes for the quick scan to complete.'

title.tr: Windows Security GUI: Settings > Privacy & Security > Windows Security > Virus & threat protection > Scan options
title.en: Windows Security GUI: Settings > Privacy & Security > Windows Security > Virus & threat protection > Scan options

title.tr: Tarama sonucu - tespit edilen tehditleri gor

steps.command: Get-MpThreatDetection | Select-Object DomainUser, InitialDetectionTime, Resources, ThreatID
